Through original programming, documentaries, and expert-led discussions, MHTN aims to increase awareness, provide valuable information, and encourage open conversations about mental well-being.

programme.title: Quo Vadis TV
programme.desc: Quo Vadis TV is committed to sharing the Biblical message in a way that makes Christian living practical, realistic, and attainable. Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

programme.title: King of the Wild Horses
programme.desc: A mustang stallion runs swiftly to the rescue when the boy who befriended him is endangered.

programme.title: Renegades
programme.desc: Hannah Brockway has a perfect fiancé in Dr. Sam Martin. Sam, who is respected by Hannah's family, is a noble man who cares for her and can make a good living in their frontier town. Yet Hannah craves adventure and finds it when she meets dashing Ben Dembrow, the youngest of a notorious crime family. Together Ben and Hannah set off to forge a new life, but prejudice and strangling family ties soon bring trouble to these newlyweds.

programme.title: Life With Father
programme.desc: In late 19th-century New York City, stockbroker Clarence Day (William Powell) strives to maintain order in his bustling household. Despite his attempts to be the chief authority over his four sons, his wife, Vinnie (Irene Dunne), is the one who truly keeps order in their home, much to Clarence's chagrin. To gain more respect, Clarence reluctantly considers making changes that will benefit everyone, including his own baptism. This slice-of-life comedy was based on a popular Broadway play.

programme.title: Father of the Bride
programme.desc: When beautiful Kay Banks (Elizabeth Taylor) announces her engagement to Buckley Dunstan (Don Taylor), her doting middle-class father, Stan (Spencer Tracy), must contend with a variety of problems, ranging from money issues to wedding planning difficulties. As things get hectic, Stan's wife, Ellie (Joan Bennett), tries to be the calm in the center of the storm. At the heart of the comedy, though, is Stan's emotional tie to his little girl, and his realization that she has indeed grown up.

programme.title: Father's Little Dividend
programme.desc: A year after dealing with a surprise engagement in Father of the Bride, Stanley Banks (Spencer Tracy) and his wife, Ellie (Joan Bennett), are in for another shock when they find their daughter Kay (Elizabeth Taylor) is now pregnant. Not ready to be a grandfather, Stanley keeps quiet while everyone else fawns over the mother-to-be and bothers her about baby names and nursery decorations. Ironically, his silence makes him the person Kay turns to the most for help, which in turn helps him.

programme.title: The Courtship of Eddie's Father
programme.desc: Realizing that he needs a mother -- and his widower father, Tom (Glenn Ford), needs a wife -- precocious Eddie Corbett (Ron Howard) is determined to get his dad remarried. While Tom dates numerous women, including the uptight aristocrat Rita Behrens (Dina Merrill), nobody seems to be a good fit for Eddie or his father. Soon it becomes apparent that Tom's ideal match may be closer than he thought, as he begins to develop feelings for his lovely neighbor, Elizabeth Marten (Shirley Jones).

programme.title: The Ride to Hangman's Tree
programme.desc: Three Old West outlaws (Jack Lord, James Farentino, Don Galloway) cross paths in California during Wells Fargo stagecoach holdups.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: When a newspaper editor drums up anti-Northern sentiment by launching a smear campaign aimed at Earp, the marshal takes a leave of absence to confront a Texas gang working with the editor.

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A businessman disappears after his wife catches sight of him in an opium den.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bells of Rosarita
programme.desc: Shortly after circus owner Sue Farnum (Dale Evans), her assistant, Gabby (George "Gabby" Hayes), and her late father's ex-partner, Slim Phillips (Addison Richards), accidentally interrupt the filming of a movie starring singing cowboy Roy Rogers (Roy Rogers), Slim is kidnapped. Sue suspects that William Ripley (Grant Withers), a crooked businessman who's trying to steal her circus, is behind the kidnapping. While Sue and Gabby set up a special performance, Roy tracks Slim's kidnappers.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: When a scout from the Battle of the Little Big Horn tries to blackmail Gen. Custer's widow, she fears he plans to provide damaging testimony at an upcoming hearing for Maj. Reno; Earp must convince her that her husband was a courageous man.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Unscrupulous businessman Moresby, seeking a way to permanently cripple Earp, convinces a boxing promoter to have his champ beat Earp, but the marshal refuses to take up the challenge until the champ's blatant cheating injures a young man in the ring.

programme.title: The Courtship of Eddie's Father
programme.desc: Realizing that he needs a mother -- and his widower father, Tom (Glenn Ford), needs a wife -- precocious Eddie Corbett (Ron Howard) is determined to get his dad remarried. While Tom dates numerous women, including the uptight aristocrat Rita Behrens (Dina Merrill), nobody seems to be a good fit for Eddie or his father. Soon it becomes apparent that Tom's ideal match may be closer than he thought, as he begins to develop feelings for his lovely neighbor, Elizabeth Marten (Shirley Jones).

programme.title: Father of the Bride
programme.desc: When beautiful Kay Banks (Elizabeth Taylor) announces her engagement to Buckley Dunstan (Don Taylor), her doting middle-class father, Stan (Spencer Tracy), must contend with a variety of problems, ranging from money issues to wedding planning difficulties. As things get hectic, Stan's wife, Ellie (Joan Bennett), tries to be the calm in the center of the storm. At the heart of the comedy, though, is Stan's emotional tie to his little girl, and his realization that she has indeed grown up.

programme.title: Father's Little Dividend
programme.desc: A year after dealing with a surprise engagement in Father of the Bride, Stanley Banks (Spencer Tracy) and his wife, Ellie (Joan Bennett), are in for another shock when they find their daughter Kay (Elizabeth Taylor) is now pregnant. Not ready to be a grandfather, Stanley keeps quiet while everyone else fawns over the mother-to-be and bothers her about baby names and nursery decorations. Ironically, his silence makes him the person Kay turns to the most for help, which in turn helps him.

programme.title: The Ride to Hangman's Tree
programme.desc: Three Old West outlaws (Jack Lord, James Farentino, Don Galloway) cross paths in California during Wells Fargo stagecoach holdups.

programme.title: Yellowstone Kelly
programme.desc: Union soldier Maj. Towns (Rhodes Reason) asks fur trapper and Indian scout Luther "Yellowstone" Kelly (Clint Walker) to scout for the Army in Sioux territory. Kelly ventures into the area, only to be taken prisoner by the Sioux. Since Kelly saved the life of Chief Gall (John Russell) years before, the chief promises to free him if Kelly treats wounded Arapaho maiden Wahleeah (Andra Martin). Soon Kelly and the recovered Wahleeah are caught between Towns' soldiers and the vengeful Sioux.

programme.title: 36 Hours
programme.desc: In occupied Germany in 1949, American military officer Jefferson Pike (James Garner) wakes up in a U.S. Army hospital with no memory of the previous five years. A kindly military psychiatrist (Rod Taylor) and his coolly detached nurse (Eva Marie Saint) draw out Pike's last clear memories, which are of General Eisenhower's final briefing for the Normandy invasion in June 1944. Soon, Pike realizes that his doctor and nurse are not who they claim to be, and that he is in great danger.

programme.title: The Oklahoman
programme.desc: While moving his family out West, Dr. John Brighton (Joel McCrea) loses his wife in childbirth. After her death, John sets up his home in Indian territory. By the time his daughter is 7 years old, two women are competing for the doctor's affections: Ann (Barbara Hale), a rancher's widow, and Maria (Gloria Talbott), a young Native American maiden who watches over the doctor's daughter. When the town bully, Mel (Douglas Dick), wants to take the land of Maria's father, the doctor gets involved.

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Mary Morstan has received a pearl in the post every year since her father's disappearance; when she is summoned to meet her mysterious benefactor, Holmes and Watson accompany her, leading to the truth about a secret pact.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Forbidden Trail
programme.desc: A practical-joking cowboy (Buck Jones) gets serious with outlaws.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp arrests a stagecoach robber who copies the style of Jesse James, but the witnesses refuse to testify and the robber goes free, leading Earp to enlist the skill of a cheating gambler to set a trap for him.

programme.title: Paid Programming: Carshield -- Cars Have Changed
36 Hours
programme.desc: In occupied Germany in 1949, American military officer Jefferson Pike (James Garner) wakes up in a U.S. Army hospital with no memory of the previous five years. A kindly military psychiatrist (Rod Taylor) and his coolly detached nurse (Eva Marie Saint) draw out Pike's last clear memories, which are of General Eisenhower's final briefing for the Normandy invasion in June 1944. Soon, Pike realizes that his doctor and nurse are not who they claim to be, and that he is in great danger.

programme.title: The Last Challenge
programme.desc: Hotshot gunfighter Lot McGuire intends to make a name for himself by out-duelling legendary bandit-turned-lawman Marshal Dan Blaine. Before any bullets fly, however, Lot and his intended enemy strike up an unlikely friendship, and Blaine tries to convince the youngster to call off the shootout. Unfortunately, Lot can't be talked out of his quest for glory, and so he guns down a few hostile locals, leaving Blaine no choice but to finally accept the offer for a showdown.

programme.title: Man of the West
programme.desc: Ex-outlaw Link Jones (Gary Cooper) is aboard a train when it is robbed by bandits. When he tries to intervene, he's knocked out and left in the middle of nowhere with saloon singer Billie (Julie London), whom he hoped to hire as a schoolteacher in his town, and Sam (Arthur O'Connell), a con man. Link brings the three to his nearby former home, now the hideout for the bandits, who are led by his uncle (Lee J. Cobb) -- and to save his new friends, he must rejoin the old gang for one last holdup.

programme.title: Man in the Saddle
programme.desc: A wounded rancher (Randolph Scott) hides with a schoolmarm (Ellen Drew) after his ex-girlfriend's husband (Alexander Knox) runs him out of town.

programme.title: Rooster Cogburn
programme.desc: Sequel to the Oscar-winning "True Grit" finds the trigger-happy Rooster trying to win back his law badge by hunting a gang of bandits and a stolen shipment of explosives. His job is not made any easier by the daughter of one of the gang's victims, who insists on coming along for the ride.

programme.title: The Undefeated
programme.desc: Unaware that the Civil War has ended, Col. John Henry Thomas (John Wayne) successfully attacks a Confederate company led by James Langdon (Rock Hudson). With the remnants of Langdon's squadron fleeing to Mexico, Thomas and his adopted Native American son, Blue Boy (Roman Gabriel), gather a herd of horses and head for the border with their company, to sell them. After Langdon's caravan is captured by a Mexican general (Tony Aguilar), Thomas nobly sacrifices the horses to free them.

programme.title: Bikini Beach
programme.desc: Dee Dee (Annette Funicello) and Frankie (Frankie Avalon) are primed to hit the beach for some fun in the sun. The only thing standing in the way of their good times is curmudgeonly developer Harvey Huntington Honeywagon (Keenan Wynn), who is intent on turning their teenage hotspot into a grazing ground for seniors. If that weren't bad enough, British rock 'n' roll singer Potato Bug (also Avalon) shows up to spark a summer romance with Frankie's main squeeze -- Dee Dee.

programme.title: The Last Challenge
programme.desc: Hotshot gunfighter Lot McGuire intends to make a name for himself by out-duelling legendary bandit-turned-lawman Marshal Dan Blaine. Before any bullets fly, however, Lot and his intended enemy strike up an unlikely friendship, and Blaine tries to convince the youngster to call off the shootout. Unfortunately, Lot can't be talked out of his quest for glory, and so he guns down a few hostile locals, leaving Blaine no choice but to finally accept the offer for a showdown.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: A former Confederate spy asks Earp and Bat to help her escape from her dead brother's gang; Bat develops feelings for the woman, but Earp, doubting her story, obeys a warrant calling for her arrest.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp agrees to escort a stage carrying money for Wells Fargo while Bat, Tom Russell and a posse set a trap for the gang planning to attack it.

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes takes a holiday in Cornwall's countryside, only to have his healthy routine interrupted by something that happened during the night.

programme.title: 2026 Proof Silver Eagle: America's 250th Anniversary Release
programme.desc: Join Mike Mezack for a historic release, the first-ever 1776-2026 dual-date Proof Silver Eagle with Liberty Bell privy mark, struck in .999 silver for America's 250th Anniversary; a one-year-only issue collectors won't want to miss.

programme.title: Adventures of Gallant Bess
programme.desc: Ted Daniels (Cameron Mitchell) is a traveling rodeo hand who is attached to very little besides Gallant Bess, the wild horse that he has trained with patience and dedication. When Ted meets Penny (Audrey Long), the beautiful daughter of Doc Gray (Harry Cheshire), he falls in love with her, but circumstances force him to choose between loyalty to his steed and the chance of having a life with Penny. Can he find a way to win back Gallant Bess and get the girl?

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Bat resigns as sheriff and enters into a partnership with local saloon owner Luke Short, who must fight a takeover attempt by two corrupt businessmen; Earp and Bat request a restraining order to stop the men but face resistance from Mayor Kelley.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bikini Beach
programme.desc: Dee Dee (Annette Funicello) and Frankie (Frankie Avalon) are primed to hit the beach for some fun in the sun. The only thing standing in the way of their good times is curmudgeonly developer Harvey Huntington Honeywagon (Keenan Wynn), who is intent on turning their teenage hotspot into a grazing ground for seniors. If that weren't bad enough, British rock 'n' roll singer Potato Bug (also Avalon) shows up to spark a summer romance with Frankie's main squeeze -- Dee Dee.

programme.title: Hands Across the Rockies
programme.desc: Wild Bill Hickok and his sidekick Cannonball meet a woman who is scheduled to marry the murderer they are trailing.

programme.title: Trail Street
programme.desc: Legendary lawman Bat Masterson (Randolph Scott) is called to rural Kansas to defend farmers from ruthless cattlemen. Joining Masterson in his efforts to clean up a lawless town are a couple of locals: Masterson's old chum Billy Burn and landowner Allen Harper (Robert Ryan). But ranch owner Logan Maury proves to be a more than formidable opponent. He'll stop at nothing, including murder, to turn the farmers' fields into grazing grounds for his cattle.

programme.title: Man in the Saddle
programme.desc: A wounded rancher (Randolph Scott) hides with a schoolmarm (Ellen Drew) after his ex-girlfriend's husband (Alexander Knox) runs him out of town.

programme.title: Day of the Badman
programme.desc: Judge Jim Scott (Fred MacMurray) wants to sentence a killer to die, but the outlaw's family members intend otherwise. All-powerful patriarch Charlie Hayes (Robert Middleton) and his intimidating kinfolk are confident they can use violence to get their doomed relative's sentence commuted into something less severe. Although Sheriff Barney Wiley (John Ericson) wilts under the family's strong-arm tactics, Scott remains determined to see justice done at the end of a rope.

programme.title: Faith & Freedom w/Shemane
programme.desc: Faith and Freedom, where we address the nation's current state surrounding God, family, and country, and where Shemane finds out more about what faith and freedom means to you.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Evolving from single-celled yellow organisms at the dawn of time, Minions live to serve, but find themselves working for a continual series of unsuccessful masters, from T. Rex to Napoleon. Without a master to grovel for, the Minions fall into a deep depression. But one minion, Kevin, has a plan; accompanied by his pals Stuart and Bob, Kevin sets forth to find a new evil boss for his brethren to follow. Their search leads them to Scarlet Overkill, the world's first-ever super-villainess.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: The mischievous Minions hope that Gru will return to a life of crime after the new boss of the Anti-Villain League fires him. Instead, Gru decides to remain retired and travel to Freedonia to meet his long-lost twin brother for the first time. The reunited siblings soon find themselves in an uneasy alliance to take down the elusive Balthazar Bratt, a former 1980s child star who seeks revenge against the world.

programme.desc: S04 E01 Blind Spot Cheyenne battles hatred and greed to rid a town of terror and reunite a father and son.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S02 E06 Denver McKee The Cartwrights' neighbor (Franchot Tone), a former soldier and lawman, seeks security for his daughter.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E10 New Orleans Menace A criminal threatens to harm Mark unless Lucas sells him the ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E11 The Apprentice Sheriff A young man takes over the duties of the sheriff, who is out of town.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E12 The Angry Gun Lucas and Mark are robbed while riding the stage back from a cattle sale.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E13 The Young Englishman Lucas suspects a nobleman, recently arrived from England, of cattle rustling.

programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: S02 E07 Steered Off Course The six remaining cowboys face off in a wild horse race over rough terrain, though tempers flare, they must work together to find stray cattle using a simple map.

programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: S02 E08 A Bull's Market Host Trace Adkins tests the cattle IQ of the remaining five cowboys with a trivia roping challenge and evaluates their communication skills as they work together to remove two rogue bulls from the herd.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S03 E28 The Clarence Bibs Story An amiable handyman in town has dreams of becoming a famous gunfighter.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S03 E29 The Score Is Even Lucas and Mark set out on a hunting trip and stumble upon a robbery.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S01 E29 Indian Fever Agarn keeps seeing an Indian sneaking around the fort, but no one else does.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S01 E30 Johnny Eagle Eye O'Rourke plans to make money on Wild Eagle's nephew in the camp's sharpshooting contest.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S03 E05 The Gold Rush Detectives When $9,000 worth of gold dust goes missing from a safe in a remote mining town, Wells Fargo sends detectives Henry Johnson and Isaiah Lees to hunt down the culprits and crack the case.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S03 E04 Burton Mossman Crosses the Line After failing to capture ruthless murderer Augustine Chacon on U.S. soil, Arizona Ranger Burton Mossman relinquishes his badge to cross the border; in Mexico, he goes undercover as a horse thief to join Chacon's gang and spring his trap.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S02 E05 Joe Walker: Humble Hero Joe Walker doesn't head west to seek fame and fortune, but his trailblazing explorations across the uncharted frontier usher in a golden age of expansion and settlement that help create the United States as we know them today.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: S02 E06 The Littlest Cowboy After a gang beats him, Ike becomes depressed about his handicap until a terminally ill boy teaches him a valuable lesson about life.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: S03 E05 The Cats of Paradise Maverick becomes involved with a woman who sells cats to mining camps.

programme.title: Reprieve
programme.desc: Sheriff Pinkerton deputizes Cheyenne, and he transports crook Wes McQueen to a hidden fortune; when someone shoots and kills McQueen, Cheyenne impersonates him in order to find the bounty.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S02 E07 Day of Reckoning Bigoted Ike Daggett takes action when Ben gives an Indian and his wife land after the Indian saves his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E14 The Gaucho An Argentine family moves to North Fork and settles on a ranch adjoining Lucas'.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.desc: Documentary. Three deaf people explain how falling in love helped them discover deaf culture, deaf identity and BSL.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: It Should Happen to You
programme.desc: (1954) Judy Holliday stars in this comedy as a smalltown girl who comes to New York and rents a billboard to publicise her name - and soon she's a TV star. With Jack Lemmon.

programme.title: Western Union
programme.desc: (1941) American frontier pioneering western starring Randolph Scott, Robert Young and Dean Jagger as three very different men working to connect east and west by telegraph in the 1860s.

programme.title: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: (1954) Classic 'cowboys and Indians' Western. Gary Cooper, Richard Widmark and Cameron Mitchell star as three rascals hired by Susan Hayward to rescue her husband from Apache territory.

programme.title: To Hell and Back
programme.desc: (1955) Fact-based wartime drama. Audie Murphy, America's most decorated soldier in WWII, plays himself in this dramatic recreation of the valiant heroics that earned him the honours.

programme.title: Behind Enemy Lines
programme.desc: (2001) Thriller with Owen Wilson. A US Navy flight officer on a NATO reconnaissance mission has to fend for himself when he's shot down by Serb forces in the former Yugoslavia. Violence.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick
programme.desc: (2022) Danger-zone action as Tom Cruise returns to the cockpit after 36 years. He's Maverick. He still feels the need for speed. And there's a near-impossible mission to fly. With Jon Hamm.

programme.title: The Equalizer 2
programme.desc: (2018) Action crime thriller sequel. Denzel Washington returns as Robert McCall, who's out for revenge after ruthless killers murder an agency contact who he also considered a friend.

programme.title: Hit the Road
programme.desc: (2021) Evocative and tender comedy drama tracking the ups and downs and round and rounds of a family on a road trip to get their eldest child out of Iran. In Persian/subs.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Halls of Montezuma
programme.desc: (1951) Second World War drama. Richard Widmark stars as a commanding officer leading US Marines into the Pacific to capture Japanese prisoners and discover the location of a rocket base.

programme.title: The Bridge on the River Kwai
programme.desc: (1957) David Lean's Oscar-winning fact-based Second World War classic stars Alec Guinness as the driven commander of a group of POWs building a rail bridge for the Japanese.

programme.title: The Enemy Below
programme.desc: (1957) Second World War thriller. Robert Mitchum stars as the captain of a US destroyer in the North Atlantic hunting down a German U-boat and its world-weary captain, Curt Jurgens.

programme.title: Oblivion Interview Special
programme.desc: Tom Cruise, Olga Kurylenko and Joseph Kosinski discuss the making of sci-fi adventure Oblivion.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: (2022) Going-for-gold action. Tom Holland and Mark Wahlberg compare abs as they scour the globe for an olde explorer's lost gold. The heat is on. The time is right. Only the best survive.

programme.title: Anna
programme.desc: (2019) Luc Besson's action-thriller about a young Russian assassin, with Sasha Luss. A scout offers Anna an opportunity to become a model in Paris, but can she escape her links to the KGB?

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: (2018) Dark sci-fi action starring Tom Hardy as Marvel's anti-hero. A reporter becomes inhabited by a ferocious alien that has its own ideas on how to behave. With Michelle Williams.

programme.title: How to Get Ahead in Advertising
programme.desc: (1989) Surreal satire from Bruce Robinson, director of Withnail & I. Richard E Grant plays a manic adman who sees the error of his ways after he grows a second head.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: A Foreign Affair
programme.desc: (1948) Billy Wilder's film stars Jean Arthur and Marlene Dietrich as the chalk-and-cheese women in post-war Berlin with John Lund as the man caught between them.

programme.title: Inglourious Basterds Interview...
programme.desc: ...Special: The director, Quentin Tarantino, together with stars Christoph Waltz and Diane Kruger and producer Lawrence Bender, talk about the Second World War revenge adventure.

programme.title: How Green Was My Valley
programme.desc: (1941) Walter Pidgeon, Maureen O'Hara and Roddy McDowall star in John Ford's multi-Oscar-winning period drama set in the mining communities of the South Wales Valleys of the 19th century.

programme.title: Mary, Queen of Scots
programme.desc: (1971) Vanessa Redgrave stars in a dramatisation of the life of the 16th-century Scottish queen. Glenda Jackson co-stars as her cousin and rival, England's Queen Elizabeth I.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: (2013) Sci-fi action-mystery set on a war-ravaged Earth that's been largely abandoned by humanity. With Tom Cruise, Andrea Riseborough, Olga Kurylenko and Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: Oblivion Interview Special
programme.desc: Tom Cruise talks about making the sci-fi-adventure Oblivion.

programme.title: Daredevil
programme.desc: (2003) Superhero fantasy. Ben Affleck is a blind lawyer who turns vigilante by night. Jennifer Garner plays his lover and Colin Farrell the villain who endangers them both. Strong violence.

programme.title: Jackass Forever
programme.desc: (2022) Outrageous adult comedy with Johnny Knoxville, Wee Man and friends. The Jackasses reunite for more painfully real stunts. Older? Yes. Wiser? You decide.

programme.title: Buffalo Soldiers
programme.desc: (2001) Joaquin Phoenix plays a US GI based in Cold War Germany who makes a living from the black market. Then his sergeant (Scott Glenn) takes an interest... Strong language/violence/drugs.

programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Incredible Shrinking Man
programme.desc: (1957) Classic sci-fi horror about the perils of radiation. A normal-sized fella gets a lot, lot smaller when he breathes in a mysterious mist. Definitely not one for arachnophobes!

programme.title: The Man from Colorado
programme.desc: (1948) Western. When a sadistic Union colonel (Glenn Ford) becomes a federal judge after the Civil War, his friend (William Holden) takes the deputy job to try and temper his actions.

programme.title: All the King's Men
programme.desc: (1949) Drama with John Ireland. A local politician begins to lust for the kind of power he used to hold to account. He should be careful how he treats people on the way to the top...

programme.title: Quentin Tarantino on Inglourious Basterds
programme.desc: The director talks about his Second World War-based film, starring Brad Pitt.

programme.title: Gunman's Walk
programme.desc: (1958) Western. Van Heflin stars as a veteran frontiersman whose determination to mould his sons in his gun-totin' image backfires disastrously. With Tab Hunter and James Darren.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: (1993) Romantic comedy starring Tom Hanks and Meg Ryan. A bereaved man gets another chance at love when his son puts him on a radio talk show.

programme.title: Escape from Pretoria
programme.desc: (2020) Daniel Radcliffe stars as an imprisoned ANC activist planning a jailbreak in apartheid-era South Africa, in Frank Annan's taut fact-based thriller. Adapted from Tim Jenkin's memoir.

programme.title: Terminator: Dark Fate
programme.desc: (2019) Sci-fi action sequel with Linda Hamilton and Arnold Schwarzenegger. A factory worker is targeted by deadly robot assassins from the future. Thank goodness he's back.

programme.title: Lola
programme.desc: (2022) Lo-fi sci-fi. In 1940, two sisters invent a contraption that intercepts future broadcasts. But it inadvertently creates an alternate timeline in which the Nazis win the war. Oops.

programme.desc: Follow the next generation of open-wheel drivers in Road To Glory: Formula Edition.

programme.title: 2026 DTM Highlights
programme.desc: The 40th season of Germany's car racing series.

programme.title: 2026 King of the Hammers
programme.desc: Only the strongest competitors and machines compete in this one-of-a-kind off-road race that requires both speed and survival to finish this true test of man and machine.

programme.title: Lost Classics
programme.desc: Tony helps an owner move a custom Mercury to none other than Joe Zolper as a potential buyer. Then, a lead sends Tony to a dusty garage hiding a nearly untouched Porsche RS America with just 5,000 original miles.

programme.title: Off-Road Travel TV
programme.desc: We head to Baja to test a race UTV, then head to Arizona for another incredible off-road adventure. Our crew also tests Sun Lite's 14 THX toy hauler trailer. This is a cool concept that offers so much versatility.

programme.title: 2026 Best of GAA Classic Car Auctions
